extortion.description: fundac.org zoominfo.com/c/fundao-para-o-desenvolvimento-das-artes-e-da-comunicao/546996710 Fundac is a non-profit organization with over 22 years of experience, focusing on projects in communication, marketing, arts, culture, education, and the environment. It collaborates with public television and works closely with both public and private sectors to optimize communication processes and promote human dignity. The organization also offers courses in journalism and communication and emphasizes public-private partnerships for community benefit. With a strong team of over 1000 collaborators and a network of journalists, Fundac is committed to enhancing media outreach and public engagement
